# MCPmarket

MCPmarket is the paid marketplace for MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Developers list MCP tools with subscription or usage-based pricing. Users subscribe and get managed hosting, API key auth, and billing handled automatically. The platform takes a 20% revenue share; developers keep 80%.

## Key Pages
- / — Landing page with value proposition, pricing tiers, and FAQ
- /servers — Browse and search all APPROVED MCP servers
- /servers/[slug] — Server detail page with README, pricing, reviews, and install config
- /pricing — Full pricing page: Basic (free + 20% rev share), Managed Hosting ($9/mo), Featured ($29/mo)
- /auth/signin — GitHub or Google OAuth sign-in
- /dashboard — User dashboard: subscriptions, API keys, billing
- /dashboard/developer — Developer dashboard: analytics, revenue, server management

## Pricing Model
- Basic: Free to list, 20% platform fee on all transactions
- Managed Hosting: $9/month per server (Docker or GitHub repo hosting)
- Featured Listing: $29/month per server (premium placement at top of browse page)
- Developer payout: 80% of gross revenue via Stripe Connect, paid monthly

## MCP Protocol
MCPmarket serves the Model Context Protocol ecosystem. MCP servers are tools that AI clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf) can connect to. After subscribing, users receive a JSON config snippet to add to their MCP client settings.

## About
Built for the MCP ecosystem post-universal adoption (Q1 2026). 97M+ SDK downloads/month. Solving the monetization gap: 11,000+ MCP servers exist, less than 5% monetized.
